name: ASUS TUF GAMING B850M-PLUS WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax 2x2 Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: ASUS TUF GAMING B850M-PLUS WIFI Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5
description: Compact Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for AMD AM5 with DDR5, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for space-constrained builds.
